title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Nerolac Select Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Nerolac Select Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Nerolac Select Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nerolac Select Capital India:
Nerolac Select Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select Capital India!
